title: Enough of this already
wikitext: []: Enough of this already! Post by ran1 » Sun Apr 25, 2010 6:37 am Split from "We should take Eva less seriously" SenorSquiid wrote: The imperfections of a work are often part of the charm, but if a person can't admit that Magma Diver (sorry fi I pick on Magma Diver, it just really stuck out for it's pointlessness in my most recent re-watch) isn't filler and is in fact an integral part of Anno's complex multi-layered work

Article: Enough of this already
[]: Enough of this already! Post by ran1 » Sun Apr 25, 2010 6:37 am Split from "We should take Eva less seriously" SenorSquiid wrote: The imperfections of a work are often part of the charm, but if a person can't admit that Magma Diver (sorry fi I pick on Magma Diver, it just really stuck out for it's pointlessness in my most recent re-watch) isn't filler and is in fact an integral part of Anno's complex multi-layered work
